name: Rabolut: Escape From Hell
short_description: A 2D pixel art game where you escape crises born in a toxic workplace. With semi-randomized maps and an increasing variety of traps as you progress, players must master movement techniques and carefully plan the use of limited resources to survive. Perfect for fans of Celeste and Getting Over It.
detailed_description:
RABOLUT: Escape From Hell is a 2D pixel art game where you escape crises born in a toxic workplace. With semi-randomized maps and an increasing variety of traps as you progress, players must master movement techniques and carefully plan the use of limited resources to survive. Upgrading equipment can significantly lower the difficulty, making it easier for story-focused players to enjoy the narrative. For fans of platforming challenges, the endless mode provides an opportunity to test your limits.

Perfect for fans of Celeste and Getting Over It with Bennett Foddy, this game combines a compelling story with skill-based gameplay. However, as the story touches on themes of workplace manipulation and PUA (Pick-Up Artist) tactics, players with related sensitivities should approach with caution.

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Japanese, Korean, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese
